pre_game.message: Hey, I’m E. It’s a bit nerve-wracking just sitting around waiting for things to start, isn't it? How are you holding up?
Hey E, I'm C. It really is. I'm doing okay, just trying to stay focused on the goal. How about you?
I'm hanging in there. I've got people back home counting on me, so that's my main motivation. What would winning this money mean for you?
It would mean everything. It’s about finally giving the people I love the stability they deserve.
I hear you, stability is everything. It sounds like we’re both here for the same reasons then.
Exactly. It’s good to meet someone who understands the pressure; it makes this whole thing feel a bit more grounded.
I agree. Having a friendly face definitely helps. Let's hope we can both find a way to make this work for our families.
I hope so too. It’s good to know we’re on the same page about what really matters.
Definitely. It’s good to have that clarity before things kick off. Let’s see what happens next.
Agreed. Good luck, E. I'm going to take a moment to clear my head before we start.
Thanks, C. Take care and good luck to you and your family.
